en: You're just too good to be true, can't take my eyes off of you, you'd be like heaven to touch, I wanna hold you so much, at long last love has arrived, and I thank God I'm alive,
You're just too good to be true, can't take my eyes off of you,
I love you baby, and if it's quite alright, I need you baby, to warm the lonely night, I love you baby,
trust in me when I say, oh pretty baby, don't bring me down I pray, oh pretty baby, now that I've found you stay, and let me love you baby, let me love you
